name: NotiFetch v2.9.11-vc37 — 8 New Features
body:
## 8 New Features Added

### 1. Onboarding Tutorial (3 screens)
First-launch walkthrough: how NotiFetch works → grant notification access → disable battery optimization. Reduces churn.

### 2. Privacy Dashboard (DPDP/GDPR Compliant)
View exact data stored, export as JSON, delete all data with one tap. Accessible from Settings → Privacy.

### 3. Battery Optimization Dialog
Detects OEM ROMs (Xiaomi/Samsung/OPPO/Vivo) and prompts user to:
- Disable battery optimization (standard Android)
- Enable Auto-start (OEM-specific screen)

Fixes the #1 "notifications stopped working" complaint.

### 4. Material You Dynamic Theming
User-toggleable in Settings. When ON, app adapts to wallpaper (Android 12+). When OFF, fixed amber/orange brand colors.

### 5. Dark Mode Toggle
Already existed in code, now properly wired + persisted across restarts.

### 6-8. DataStore Keys + Settings Wiring
- ONBOARDING_COMPLETED_KEY: prevents onboarding re-showing
- DYNAMIC_COLOR_KEY: persists Material You preference
- SettingsScreen → Privacy Dashboard navigation

### Verification
- Build: SUCCESSFUL, 0 errors
- AAB signed with original Play Store upload key (SHA-1: 59:70:88:1E...)
- All 169 tracked platforms still active
- All previous fixes (v2.9.5 through v2.9.10) preserved

### Deliverables
- NotiFetch-v2.9.11-vc37-release.aab (9.5 MB)
- NotiFetch-v2.9.11-vc37-debug.apk (26.5 MB)

### Test Plan
1. Sideload debug APK
2. First launch shows onboarding (3 screens)
3. Settings → toggle Dark Mode / Material You
4. Settings → Privacy Dashboard → Export my data (JSON)
5. If on Xiaomi/Samsung: grant battery + auto-start permissions
